title: Eva's first big kick — ball flies high
prompt: Wide gym shot in @ymca-gym, the basketball hoop visible high on the back wall. @Eva already on the CENTER-RIGHT of the gym floor, foot drawn back behind a soccer ball, eyes locked, tongue out. @Sara already on the LEFT in the foreground, arms crossed, watching skeptically. Eva swings her leg forward and KICKS the ball — the ball flies HIGH up in the air, almost reaching the ceiling, both watch it arc upward. Eva (eyes huge, hands on her hips, very proud): "SEE? EASY!" Sara (still tracking the ball way up there, deadpan): "...that's the basketball hoop you just hit." The ball drops back down and bounces.
